zh.Radbourne, Derbyshire, England: 英國德比夏爾拉德布恩
zh.Davenham, Cheshire, England: 英國英格蘭爾達文哈姆
zh.Radbourne, South Derbyshire district, De: 英國英格蘭德比夏爾拉德布恩
zh.lifeSummary: 當Allianore Chandos於大約1330年出生在英國德比夏爾拉德布恩時，她的父親Edward de Chandos47歲，母親Elizabeth Twyford47歲。她與John de Laughton結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1373年之後。

zh-hans.Radbourne, Derbyshire, England: 英国德比夏爾拉德布恩
zh-hans.Davenham, Cheshire, England: 英国英格兰爾達文哈姆
zh-hans.Radbourne, South Derbyshire district, De: 英国英格兰德比夏爾拉德布恩
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Allianore Chandos于大约1330年出生在英国德比夏爾拉德布恩时，她的父亲Edward de Chandos47岁，母亲Elizabeth Twyford47岁。她与John de Laughton结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1373年之后。

nameMeanings.name: Chandos
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman, English: locative name from Candos in Illeville-sur-Montfort (Eure).

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Allianore Chandos was born about 1330, in Radbourne, Derbyshire, England, her father, Edward de Chandos, was 47 and her mother, Elizabeth Twyford, was 47. She married John de Laughton. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She died after 1373.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Allianore Chandos est née environ 1330, à Radbourne, Derbyshire, Angleterre, son père, Edward de Chandos, avait 47 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Twyford, avait 47 ans. Elle a épousé John de Laughton. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée après 1373.

de.lifeSummary: Als Allianore Chandos um 1330 in Radbourne, Derbyshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Edward de Chandos 47 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth Twyford 47. Sie hat John de Laughton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb nach 1373.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Allianore Chandos è nata il circa 1330 nel Radbourne, Derbyshire, England, sua padre, Edward de Chandos, aveva 47 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth Twyford, aveva 47 anni. Lei sposato John de Laughton. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì dopo il 1373.

ja.Radbourne, Derbyshire, England: イギリスデルブイシュアイアラドボウルン
ja.Davenham, Cheshire, England: イギリスイギリスチェシュアイアダベンハム
ja.Radbourne, South Derbyshire district, De: イギリスイギリスデルブイシュアイアラドボウルン
ja.lifeSummary: Allianore Chandosが約1330年にイギリスデルブイシュアイアラドボウルンで生まれた時，父Edward de Chandosは47歳，母Elizabeth Twyfordは47歳であった。John de Laughtonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1373年以後に死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Allianore Chandos(이)가 대략 1330년 영국 더비실르 라드보우른에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Edward de Chandos(은)는 47세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Twyford(은)는 47세였다. 그녀는 John de Laughton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1373년 이후 사망했다.

mn.Davenham, Cheshire, England: Davenham, Legeceasterscir, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс
mn.Radbourne, South Derbyshire district, De: Radbourne, Deorbyscir, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Allianore Chandos nasceu aproximadamente 1330, em Radbourne, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Edward de Chandos, tinha 47 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Twyford, tinha 47 anos. Ela casou-se com John de Laughton. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu após 1373.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Allianore Chandos родилась около 1330 г. в местности радбурн, дирбишир, Англия, её отцу по имени Edward de Chandos было 47 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Twyford, 47. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John de Laughton. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла после 1373 г.

sm.about 1330–Aft 1373: e tusa o le 1330–ina ua ma'ea le 1373

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Allianore Chandos nació aproximadamente 1330, en Radbourne, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Edward de Chandos, tenía 47 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Twyford, tenía 47 años. Se casó con John de Laughton. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió después de 1373.
